app.title: FlipHTML5 Downloader
app.subtitle: Convert flipbook pages into a single PDF file
lang.label: Language
url.label: Book URL
pageRange.label: Page range
footer.hint: The output file is saved in the application folder. When finished, you can open the PDF or copy it elsewhere.
errors.urlEmpty: Please enter a FlipHTML5 book URL.
errors.pageNumbersInvalid: Page numbers must be valid positive integers.
errors.pageStartAfterEnd: Start page cannot be greater than end page.
errors.pageRangeOutOfBounds: Page range must be between 1 and {max}.
errors.pageCountUnknown: Could not determine the number of pages for this book.
errors.noPageUrls: No page image URLs were found for this book.
errors.decryptInvalid: Decrypted FlipHTML5 page list is invalid.
errors.legacyUrls: Could not build legacy image URLs from this book URL.
errors.pagesNotFound: Could not find page images in this FlipHTML5 book. The site format may have changed.
alert.electronRequired: This app must be run with Electron. From the project folder run: npm install && npm start
